description: Prepares India PESO petroleum/explosives/pressure-vessel licensing packages and the MSIHC Major Accident Hazard on-site emergency plan: it resolves the installation and licence type to the matched rule, the form, and the authority, legacy-first, with mandatory state detection where the obligation is state-specific and the OSH-Code transition note appended. It never uses a hard-coded national form number — every form is cited from the KB row. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: peso-licensing-assistant
